steps.title: Apply the vertical shift rule
steps.content:
When a function is shifted up by $k$ units, we add $k$ to the function value. For a shift up by 9 units, we have:
$$g(x) = f(x) + 9$$

steps.title: Substitute and match
steps.content:
Substitute $f(x) = 3x + 5$:
$$g(x) = (3x + 5) + 9 = 3x + 5 + 9$$
This matches choice A — A is correct.
